title: Persistent Goal-Seeking Intelligence Accumulation Engine
canonical_statement: GoalOS AGIALPHA Ascension is an experimental framework for a persistent, goal-seeking, self-improving intelligence system that accumulates capabilities, evidence, and economic value over time.
claim_boundary: Economic value means measurable workflow value, sponsor demand, evidence-backed trust, and reusable capability - not token price or investment return

accumulates.capabilities: validated workflows, rubrics, policies, mission plans, and reusable artifacts
accumulates.evidence: ProofBundles, attestations, Evidence Dockets, reviews, challenge outcomes, and chronicle entries
accumulates.economic_value: measured productivity, sponsor demand, trust, lower repeated work, and better proof-work routing
